headerDisplay: Polestar homebridge plugin. Exposes your Polestar vehicle(s) as HomeKit accessories with battery level, charging state, and charging outlet services.
footerDisplay: This plugin is not affiliated with or endorsed by Polestar.

email.title: Polestar Account Email
email.description: The email address used to log in to the Polestar app / polestarid.eu.polestar.com.

vin.title: Vehicle VIN (optional)
vin.description: If you have multiple vehicles, enter a specific VIN here. Leave blank to expose all vehicles.

refreshInterval.title: Refresh Interval (seconds)
refreshInterval.description: How frequently (in seconds) to poll the Polestar API for updated vehicle data.
